title: NURTURE OREGON - 211info
text: OREGON WASHINGTON HEALTH NETWORK NURTURE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides substance use disorder treatment, which may include the following services: Education/rehabilitation, peer services, Medication Assisted Treatments, on-site drug and alcohol assessments, doula and maternity care for pregnant families. Participants can also access a weekly mother's support group. 200 SE Hailey Avenue Suite 307 Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Pregnant or postpartum individuals Hours: Support group: Monday 4pm-5pm All other services: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (541) 612-2255 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 612-2255 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, private health insurance, and offers a sliding fee scale DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow, Umatilla, and Union Counties Services: Doula Services Peer Mental Health Support Services * Pregnant Individuals Perinatal Substance Use Disorder Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHANGE THROUGH COMPASSION MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - COPES 4 YOUTH PEER CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - COPES OUTPATIENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON WASHINGTON HEALTH NETWORK
